name: Section 1256 Contract Loss Carryback Election

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must have a net loss from Section 1256 contracts (e.g., regulated futures) and have paid tax on such gains in the prior 3 years.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows non-corporate taxpayers to elect to carry back net Section 1256 contract losses 3 years to offset prior Section 1256 gains.
